name: ConditionalTokens
description: Gnosis Conditional Tokens Framework (ERC1155). Manages all prediction market position tokens — condition preparation, position splitting/merging, payout reporting, and redemption. Uses ECMH for collection ID derivation. Holds all collateral backing positions. **Third-party contract: only vulnerabilities arising from Polymarket's integration patterns are in scope.**

name: FeeModule
description: Fee proxy that intercepts order matching, delegates to CTFExchange, and handles maker fee refunds based on BPS calculations. Admin-only matchOrders() and withdrawFees().

name: NegRiskAdapter
description: Core adapter for multi-outcome (negative risk) markets. Manages YES/NO position conversion, collateral splitting/merging/redemption via WrappedCollateral. Routes fees to Vault.

name: NegRiskFeeModule
description: Fee module variant for NegRiskCtfExchange with ERC1155 approvals for NegRiskAdapter interaction.

name: NegRiskOperator
description: Permissioned operator for market preparation, question resolution, and dispute flagging. Prevents multiple TRUE resolutions per market.

name: NegRiskUmaCtfAdapter
description: UmaCtfAdapter instance configured for NegRisk markets. Same codebase as UmaCtfAdapter.

name: NegRiskWrappedCollateral
description: RC20 wrapper around USDC.e enabling the NegRiskAdapter to manage collateral separately from ConditionalTokens. Permissionless unwrap; owner-restricted mint/burn.

name: ProxyFactory
description: Deploys deterministic (CREATE2) proxy wallets for Polymarket users. Integrates with Gas Station Network for relay functionality.

name: SafeFactory
description: eploys deterministic Gnosis Safe proxies for Polymarket users. EIP-712 signature verification for proxy creation.

name: UmaCtfAdapter
description: Oracle adapter integrating UMA's Optimistic Oracle for market resolution. Handles initialization, data requests, dispute escalation (2-hour proposal period, DVM escalation), and CTF condition resolution.

name: CollateralToken
description: UUPS upgradeable ERC20 (pUSD, 6 decimals). Wraps USDC/USDC.e. Role-based access: MINTER_ROLE for mint/burn, WRAPPER_ROLE for wrap/unwrap. Both proxy contract and implementation contract are in scope.

name: CollateralOnramp
description: Wraps USDC/USDC.e into pUSD (CollateralToken). Admin-gated with pausable per-asset functionality.

name: CollateralOfframp
description: Unwraps pUSD back to USDC/USDC.e. Admin-gated with pausable per-asset functionality.

name: PermissionedRamp
description: EIP-712 witness-signed wrap/unwrap for CollateralToken. Uses nonces for replay protection and deadline-based expiry.

name: CTFExchangeV2
description: V2 exchange with optimized assembly (EIP-712 hashing, event emission, address derivation). Three settlement paths: COMPLEMENTARY (P2P), MINT (split), MERGE. Adds UserPausable, preapproved orders, and builder metadata.

name: NegRiskCtfExchangeV2
description: V2 exchange variant for negative risk markets. Same as CTFExchangeV2 with pre-approved NegRiskAdapter interactions.

name: Vault
description: ERC20/ERC1155 token vault for protocol fees collected by NegRiskAdapter. Admin-controlled transfer functions.

name: CtfCollateralAdapter (Address 1)
description: Bridges pUSD and CTF for standard markets. Unwraps pUSD to USDC.e for CTF split operations, wraps back on merge. Pausable per-asset.

name: CtfCollateralAdapter (Address 2)
description: Bridges pUSD and CTF for standard markets. Unwraps pUSD to USDC.e for CTF split operations, wraps back on merge. Pausable per-asset.

name: NegRiskCtfCollateralAdapter (Address 1)
description: Extends CtfCollateralAdapter for negative risk markets. Adds NO to YES position conversion via NegRiskAdapter.

name: NegRiskCtfCollateralAdapter (Address 2)
description: Extends CtfCollateralAdapter for negative risk markets. Adds NO to YES position conversion via NegRiskAdapter.

name: DepositWallet (Implementation)
description: UUPS-upgradeable smart-contract wallet (logic contract) behind per-user ERC-1967 proxies deployed by the factory. Supports EIP-712 signed batch execution (owner or session signer), ERC-1271 signature validation, two-step ownership transfers, an owner-controlled pause + timelock for emergency asset recovery, and factory-gated UUPS upgrades.

name: DepositWalletFactory (Implementation)
description: Factory logic contract behind the UUPS proxy. Deterministically deploys DepositWallet ERC-1967 proxies (via Solady LibClone) and proxies signed batch executions into them. Three-tier role model (Owner / Admin / Operator) on Solady OwnableRoles; maintains an authorizedImplementation mapping gating wallet deployments and upgrades.

name: DepositWalletFactory (Proxy)
description: User-facing ERC-1967 proxy holding all factory state. UUPS upgrades restricted to the factory owner. Both this proxy and the implementation (DepositWalletFactory (Implementation)) are in scope.

name: PositionManager
description: ERC1155 PositionManager that mints/burns user positions on behalf of registered modules and encodes module routing directly in each position ID.

name: CombinatorialModule
description: Multi-leg conjunction module (moduleId=3) handling split, merge, refinement, extraction, compression, redemption, and wrap/unwrap of combinatorial positions.

name: Exchange
description: EIP-712 order-matching exchange with direct-to-module mint/merge transfers; supports EOA, ERC-1271, POLY_PROXY, and POLY_GNOSIS_SAFE signatures.

name: BinaryModule
description: YES/NO binary-market module (moduleId=1) handling split/merge/redeem, oracle payout reporting, and the legacy CTF→V2 binary migration path.

name: NegRiskModule
description: Negative-risk multi-outcome module (moduleId=2) supporting horizontal split/merge and NO→YES conversion across event conditions, plus legacy NegRiskAdapter→V2 migration.

name: Router
description: User-facing split/merge/redeem router (and NegRisk horizontal entry points) using the pre-transfer pattern to mint/burn directly through modules.

name: AutoRedeemer
description: Batch auto-redemption helper that lets authorised operators redeem resolved V2 and legacy CTF/NegRiskAdapter positions on behalf of users that have approved this contract.

name: Perps ExchangeV1
description: Polymarket perpetuals exchange v1 state root commit and fund management contract
